message:
feat(search): add scope-aware cache discriminator to prevent cross-scope query collisions

Identical query text with different scope policies (product, project,
caller-scoped) was hitting the same cache entries, returning results
from the wrong scope boundary.

- Add cache_scope_discriminator() that hashes product_id, project_id,
  doc_kind, and the full ScopePolicy variant (including sorted project
  sets for deterministic hashing) into a u64
- Fold the scope discriminator into the cursor-based pagination hash
  so different scopes produce different cache keys even with identical
  query strings and cursor tokens
- Import ScopePolicy from search_planner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
